en_detay:
Revision Rhinoplasty is an operation that has been operated before, but still has nasal deformities and breathing problems, and aims to correct the psychological effects that occur with these problems. This operation is more difficult than Rhinoplasty operations. It is a surgery in which patient expectation is high, but the success rate may be lower than the first surgery. In addition, it is an operation that requires a sensitive surgical experience and must be performed meticulously.

rnrn

The operation is applied for the treatment of problems that occur after the previous operation. It is aimed to reshape the nose and provide an aesthetic appearance compatible with the face. It aims to eliminate the collapse of the nasal dorsum (saddle nose deformity), the appearance of the arch on the nasal dorsum, the deviation of the septum (bone curvature), the increase in tissue loss inside or outside the nose, the swelling of the nasal concha and the related breathing complaints.

rnrn

The operation takes approximately 2.5-3 hours. Patients are hosted in the hospital for 1 night after the operation. In this process, treatments that accelerate healing and cold applications are made. In order to protect sensitive areas such as cartilage and bones, a plaster and a silicone pad with a hole in the middle are placed. Silicone pads are removed after 2 days, nasal tip sutures are removed after 7 days and the patient returns to his daily life.

en_detay:
This procedure, which has become very popular recently, is an operation that attracts a lot of attention by patients who do not prefer surgical operations. This method, which is used in people who are not satisfied with their facial features, and who have sagging and wrinkling on the skin surface, is a therapeutic method that can also be used in patients with partial facial paralysis. Since the product used is biologically compatible with the human body, it is possible to remain under the skin for years depending on the brand of the product.

rnrn

Considering the long healing processes and costs of surgical operations, the French sling is a very comfortable treatment method. In this process, medical threads used in face lift surgeries are used. There are awns on these threads that provide attachment to the tissue. After the operation, it is aimed to treat the wrinkles and sagging on the face.

rnrn

The only difference between the French sling and surgical operations is the permanence period. The processing time is between 45 minutes and 1 hour on average. After the operation, a little edema and needle scar may remain. These complaints last for an average of 1 week, then you can continue with your daily life. During fast movements and jaw movements, tension may be felt in the places where the ropes are located. These complaints usually disappear after the 2nd week.

rnrn

After the procedure, it is not recommended to lie face down for 1 month, eat crusty and hard foods, make exaggerated mimic movements, and movements that require the jaw to be opened too much.

Almond eye aesthetics is performed for purely aesthetic purposes. With this operation, it is aimed to make the outer edge of the eye look more slanted by pulling up. The most important thing to note here is that the slanting is suitable for the eye. The general purpose is to make the image that is tried to be given with make-up permanent. Contrary to popular belief, the eyes do not grow in almond eye aesthetics, they just become more slanting.

rnrn

The operation takes an average of 1 hour. Depending on whether or not combined surgery is performed, the length of stay in the hospital may vary. The patient with only almond eye aesthetics is discharged on the same day. Generally, the stitches are removed between 5-7 days, after which the edema on the face decreases significantly and the patient can return to his normal life.

en_detay:
Rhinoplasty is an operation that aims to solve the deformities of the nose and to correct the psychological effects that occur with these problems. In this operation, the face is evaluated as a whole and the most appropriate intervention is performed according to the general structure and expression of the face.

rnrn

The patient's entire health history, along with nasal problems, is considered as a whole before the operation. Whether there is any other internal disorder in the nose; The patient's allergic conditions, previous surgeries or facial trauma are evaluated in detail. In the light of all these data, the most appropriate method for the patient is selected and applied. The operation can be performed with open or closed technique. Bone and cartilages that are curved and cause breathing problems are removed, shaped and placed back into the nose. In the operation, the cartilage, bone, ligaments and tissue that hold these structures together in the nose are tried to be preserved as much as possible. In addition, if there is an enlarged nasal cavity or cyst that causes obstruction in breathing, these pathologies are also intervened at the same time. In summary, rhinoplasty is an operation that requires a delicate surgical experience and must be performed meticulously.

rnrn

The operation is applied to reshape the nose and provide an aesthetic appearance compatible with the face. With this operation, the nose can be reduced; The angle of the nose with the upper lip can be changed, the tip of the nose is repaired and other defects such as indentation and protrusion in the nose can be corrected, the septum structure is straightened by correcting the bones and cartilage that shape your nose. The septum is the cartilage and bone structure that separates your nostrils.

rnrn

The operation takes about 2-3 hours. Patients are hosted in the hospital for 1 night after the operation. In this process, treatments that accelerate healing and cold applications are made. A plaster or plastic splint and a silicone pad with a hole in the middle are placed to protect sensitive areas such as cartilage and bones. Silicone pads are removed after 2 days and nasal tip sutures are removed after 7 days and the patient returns to his daily life.

en_detay:
The structure that divides the nasal airway into two in the middle of the nose and consists of bone and cartilage is called the septum. Congenital or acquired curvature of the septum may occur. The most common cause of congenital curvatures is difficult birth and birth trauma. Acquired nasal septum curvatures are facial traumas that occur while the development of the nose continues. If the septum in the middle of the nose is curved, it is called nasal septum deviation, and the surgical correction of this condition is called septoplasty. Septorhinoplasty is an operation that aims to solve nasal deformities and breathing problems and to correct the psychological effects that occur with these problems. In septoplasty surgery, both the bone curvature that prevents breathing is intervened (septoplasty) and the most appropriate aesthetic intervention (rhinoplasty) is performed according to the general structure and expression of the face.

rnrn

The patient's entire health history, along with nasal problems, is considered as a whole before the operation. Whether there are other internal disorders in the nose; The patient's allergic conditions, previous surgeries or facial trauma are evaluated in detail. In the light of all these data, the most appropriate method for the patient is selected and applied. The operation can be performed with open or closed technique. Bone and cartilages that are curved and cause breathing problems are removed, shaped and placed back into the nose. In the operation, cartilage, bone, ligaments and tissue that hold these structures together are tried to be preserved as much as possible. In a situation where bone and cartilage are not preserved and all of them are removed, saddle nose deformity occurs in which collapses on the nasal dorsum occur, and in this case, deformity and breathing problems continue after the surgery. In summary, Septorhinoplasty is an operation that requires sensitive surgical accumulation and must be performed meticulously.

rnrn


rnThe operation is performed to reshape the nose, to provide an aesthetic appearance compatible with the face and to eliminate the functional problems of the nose. As I always say in my interviews with my patients, a nose that is aesthetically beautiful but you can't breathe is like a stylish but tight-fitting shoe. Living with a nose that you cannot use and cannot breathe is very tormenting and eventually goes to revision. With this operation, the nose can be reduced; The angle of the nose with the upper lip can be changed, the tip of the nose is repaired and other defects such as indentation and protrusion in the nose can be corrected, the septum structure is straightened by correcting the bones and cartilage that shape your nose. In addition, problems that cause breathing difficulties are detected. At the beginning of these problems is the growth of the nasal flesh on the opposite side of the bone inclination. The enlargement of the nasal flesh also causes the continuation of nasal congestion if it is not intervened and it definitely requires intervention. I make intranasal endoscopic evaluations of all of my patients who will have septoplasty or septorhinoplasty surgery, if necessary, I apply advanced imaging methods with computed tomography, and I definitely perform operations on the concha during the operation.

rnrn

The operation takes about 2-3 hours. Patients are hosted in the hospital for 1 night after the operation. In this process, treatments that accelerate healing and cold applications are made. In order to protect sensitive areas such as cartilage and bones, a plaster and a silicone pad with a hole in the middle are placed. Silicone pads are removed after 2 days, nasal tip sutures are removed after 7 days and the patient returns to his daily life.

en_detay:
Lip aesthetic operation is an operation that is applied to patients who complain about lip size and has permanent results. With aging, sagging occurs in the upper lip such as eyebrows, eyelids, cheeks and neck. With aging, deformations and wrinkles may occur in the mucous membrane and lip cover. For this reason, the need for lip aesthetics is seen more in advanced ages. There are signs of lip aging, such as lengthening of the lip-nose distance and turning inward on the sides of the upper lip with age. In addition to sagging due to age, structural lip aesthetics may be needed. Unfortunately, incorrect filling applications can also cause permanent damage to the lips.

rnrn

Patients who need lip aesthetics usually perform lip augmentation without being aware of this need, but they are not satisfied with the result. Because with incorrectly applied lip fillers, the lips can get longer and gain an uncomfortable appearance that is incompatible with the face.

rnrn

Although lip lift due to aging is performed more frequently, the number of young patients who come with the request of lip lift has been increasing recently. Especially young patients with long lip-to-nose distance and thin lip structure want a permanent and one-time treatment instead of gradual lip augmentation with filling procedures.

rnrn

The solution to such problems is lip aesthetic operation. There are two types of surgical methods here. In one, the lip parts that are desired to be lifted are pulled upwards with hidden incisions made from the base of the nose. This process also shortens the lip-nose distance. The other method is the incisions made on the inner part of the lip, the mucous membrane and lip covering are adjusted and the inner length of the lip is shortened. With this process, in which the lip is turned in the opposite direction, the muscles are also intervened for tightening and the lip is given a good appearance.

rnrn

The surgery can be performed under general or local anesthesia and usually takes 1 hour. After the operation, the patient is discharged directly. It is necessary to avoid traumas for 10 to 15 days after the operation.

en_detay:
With aging, there is a decrease in the carrier proteins that form the structure of the skin covering the face, the number of carrier cells and the substances that fill the space between these cells decrease. For this reason, the skin loses its thickness, flexible structure and smooth appearance, and sometimes some color changes may occur. The skin, which has lost its elasticity and protein structure, wrinkles and sags. These problems manifest themselves most prominently on the cheeks, neck and outer parts of the eyebrows. Smoking, unhealthy life, harmful effects of the sun are the main effects that accelerate the sagging process of the skin. The general health status of the patient, the amount of sagging skin, and other facial deformations should be evaluated together and the most appropriate treatment should be decided together.

rnrn

The aim of facelift surgery is to remove sagging in the cheek area, lower parts of the face and chin/neck line. As a result of the face lift operation, the patient regains a young and natural appearance. This operation can be combined with operations applied to other parts of the face (eyelid, temple-forehead lift and fat injections). Facelift with surgical operation is the method with the longest permanence, although the healing process is longer when compared to other methods.

rnrn

In face lift surgery, the layers on the face are carefully opened with the incisions made from the scalp area behind the ear. The opened skin is stretched backwards and upwards, and sagging tissues are intervened. At the end of about 1 week, the sutures are removed, at the end of this period, edema on the face will disappear significantly. Post-operative pain is not very severe, it can be relieved with simple painkillers. It may take 4-6 months for the skin to settle on the face and take its final shape. In this process, physical impacts and interventions on the face should be avoided.

Bichectomy is an operation that provides more prominent cheekbones and a thinner facial line by removing the inner cheek fat. With aging, the inner cheek fat tissues grow and a round appearance appears on the face. With the bichectomy operation, the round and disproportionate appearance of the facial features is removed and the face is provided with a thinner appearance in accordance with the golden ratio.

rnrn

Bichectomy is a very practical and comfortable surgical intervention, it can be applied to anyone between the ages of 18-45. The operation is usually performed under local anesthesia, but it can also be performed under general anesthesia if necessary. Bichectomy surgery takes between 30 and 45 minutes on average. The patient is discharged immediately after the operation and can return to your daily life. The appearance that occurs with bichectomy is permanent, but in the future, excessive weight gain of the patient may cause the results of the operation to be lost.

en_detay:
Scar aesthetics, that is, scar revision, is an operation applied to alleviate the appearance of scars caused by various reasons. We can say that plastic surgery methods can be applied to alleviate the appearance of scars or, if possible, to completely remove them, as well as non-surgical methods.

rnrn

Depending on the type of injury in any part of the body, the location of the wound, the methods used for repair, skin structure, and skin elasticity, your scar may have different depths and appearances. However, we should also state that scar revision can be performed for any type of scar.

rnrn

Scar treatment is applied for the healing of scars and cuts that occur in the body for different reasons. Even if the wound is closed by itself, the scars may persist for a long time in the scars caused by the surgery, such as cut marks and injuries. Scars differ according to the genetic structure of the person, the region of the wound, age, race, skin type and health status. A wound of the same severity may not have the same effect on everyone.

rnrn

The result of aesthetic interventions applied for scars is permanent. After 6 months to 1 year after the healing of the wound, you can have an aesthetic intervention for the removal of the scar or the lightening of its appearance. The operation is performed under local anesthesia. The patient is discharged immediately after the application and can return to his daily life.
